stemHtml: Refer to figure or CAP696 file 3.5. Extract the forward and aft centre of gravity limit from the given diagram for a mass of 4300 lb.

options.a: Forward CG limit 88.0 in. Aft CG limit 94.0 in.
options.b: Forward CG limit 87.2 in. Aft CG limit 94.6 in.
options.c: Forward CG limit 88.0 in. Aft CG limit 94.6 in.
options.d: Forward CG limit 87.2 in. Aft CG limit 94.0 in.
